sentence: Your choppleganger cannot deliver the peanemizz you never had.

wombos.definition: A doppelganger who is a clearly inferior, chopped-up version of you — a lookalike that did not get the same glow-up. 'I'm legiterally Frank Gallagher's choppleganger.'
A peanemis delivered with natural charm and rizz — not just an analysis but a magnetically smooth, effortlessly cool deep-dive. Someone with peanemizz makes the peanemis irresistible.
